# Quality control {#sec-qc}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(qc_figures)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())
qc <- qc_figures

wrap_lab <- function(x, width = 18L) {
  vapply(strwrap(x, width = width, simplify = FALSE), paste, collapse = "\n", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
metric_lab <- function(x) {
  c(nCount_RNA = "UMIs", nFeature_RNA = "detected genes", percent_mt = "mitochondrial %",
    percent_ribo = "ribosomal %", percent_malat1 = "MALAT1 %",
    percent_contam = "contamination %")[x]
}
genotype_labels <- c(MAPTKI = "MAPTKI", P301S = "P301S",
                     NLGF_MAPTKI = "NLGF + MAPTKI",
                     NLGF_P301S = "NLGF + P301S")
sample_key_row <- qc$modality_table$modality == "proteomics sample key"
metric_names <- metric_lab(qc$metric_bounds$metric)
stopifnot(
  is.list(qc),
  all(c("modality_table", "geomx_genotype", "genotype_batch", "depth_distribution",
        "fraction_distribution", "metric_bounds", "audit_notes", "study_design") %in% names(qc)),
  all(c("genotype_grid", "sample_counts", "modalities", "contrasts") %in% names(qc$study_design)),
  nrow(qc$modality_table) == 5L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$genotype_grid) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$sample_counts) == 12L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$modalities) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$contrasts) == 5L,
  sum(sample_key_row) == 1L,
  !anyNA(metric_names),
  nrow(qc$geomx_genotype) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$genotype_batch) == 16L,
  length(unique(qc$genotype_batch$batch)) == 4L,
  all(qc$genotype_batch$Freq > 0),
  sum(qc$geomx_genotype$n_aoi) == 91L,
  qc$modality_table$n_samples[sample_key_row] == 16L,
  all(qc$metric_bounds$within),
  all(qc$metric_bounds$n_na == 0L)
)
```

## Study design

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-study-design
#| fig-width: 12.5
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "One 2x2 tau-by-amyloid genotype design, read by four modalities -- snRNAseq microglia (subset from the full all-cell-type dataset), GeoMx spatial, bulk proteomics and phosphoproteomics -- each at its own resolution, supporting the five factorial contrasts headlined by the amyloid-by-tau interaction."
#| fig-alt: "A left-to-right schematic. Left: the 2x2 genotype grid -- tau background (MAPTKI, P301S) across the amyloid axis (NLGF minus, NLGF plus) -- as four coloured tiles. Middle: four modality nodes -- snRNAseq microglia subset from the full all-cell-type dataset, GeoMx spatial, and bulk proteomics and phosphoproteomics -- each reading that same grid at its own resolution and sample count, with the two bulk modalities bracketed as the same set of 24-month samples. Right: converging arrows meet a panel listing the five factorial contrasts -- four simple tau and amyloid effects plus the emphasized amyloid-by-tau interaction -- glossed as whether amyloid reshapes microglia differently under mutant tau."

# Graphical-abstract schematic, three stations left to right: the shared 2x2 genotype design ->
# four modality readouts at their own resolution/n -> the difference-in-differences interaction
# target. Data-backed -- every count/range comes from qc$study_design$modalities (derived in
# qc_figure_data), never a literal here. Hand-placed coords on theme_void; the genotype palette
# stays reserved for the genotype tiles (modality bullets are neutral) so colour never aliases
# meaning across stations.
design_grid <- qc$study_design$genotype_grid
design_grid$genotype <- factor(as.character(design_grid$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
design_grid$tile_lab <- gsub("\n", " ", design_grid$label)
mods <- qc$study_design$modalities
mods <- mods[order(mods$order), , drop = FALSE]

# 2x2 tile centres: tau background -> x, amyloid -> y. Modalities stack down station 2 at x = 5.25.
tx <- c(MAPTKI = 1.0, P301S = 2.05)
ay <- c(`NLGF-` = 1.95, `NLGF+` = 3.15)
design_grid$gx <- tx[as.character(design_grid$tau_background)]
design_grid$gy <- ay[as.character(design_grid$amyloid)]
mod_y <- c(3.55, 2.72, 1.89, 1.06)
mods$my <- mod_y[mods$order]
mods$mx <- 5.25
mods$node_text <- sprintf("%s\n%s", mods$modality, mods$count_lab)

# bulk proteomics + phospho are the same 16 24M samples -> bracket the shared_bulk rows as one set.
shared <- mods[mods$shared_bulk, , drop = FALSE]
shared_y <- range(shared$my)
shared_lab <- sprintf("same %s\n24M samples", format(shared$n_total[1L], big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE))

# station 3 = the five factorial comparisons run on the shared design (data-backed from
# qc$study_design$contrasts). Four simple tau/amyloid effects as a gloss|formula ledger; the
# difference-in-differences interaction emphasised below as the primary integration target.
ctr <- qc$study_design$contrasts
simple <- ctr[!ctr$is_interaction, , drop = FALSE]
simple$ry <- c(3.5, 3.0, 2.5, 2.0)
simple$gloss_x <- 9.5
simple$form_x <- 9.65
inter <- ctr[ctr$is_interaction, , drop = FALSE]
inter_text <- sprintf("%s (primary target)\n%s", inter$gloss, inter$formula)

bands <- data.frame(
  xmin = c(0.15, 4.05, 7.7), xmax = c(3.05, 6.95, 12.05), ymin = 0.55, ymax = 3.95,
  label = c("GENOTYPE DESIGN", "FOUR MODALITIES", "COMPARISONS"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
bands$label_x <- (bands$xmin + bands$xmax) / 2
big_arrow <- data.frame(x = 3.2, xend = 3.95, y = 2.3, yend = 2.3)
conv <- data.frame(x = 6.05, y = mod_y, xend = 7.5, yend = 2.4)

ggplot() +
  geom_rect(data = bands, aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, fill = "#F7F5EF", colour = NA) +
  geom_text(data = bands, aes(label_x, 4.18, label = label), inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fontface = "bold", size = 3.0, colour = "#8A857B") +
  # station 1: shared 2x2 genotype design
  geom_tile(data = design_grid, aes(gx, gy, fill = genotype),
            width = 0.9, height = 1.0, colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = design_grid, aes(gx, gy, label = tile_lab),
            colour = "#F8F6F1", fontface = "bold", size = 2.45, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  annotate("text", x = tx["MAPTKI"], y = 1.28, label = "MAPTKI", size = 2.3, colour = "#53504A") +
  annotate("text", x = tx["P301S"], y = 1.28, label = "P301S", size = 2.3, colour = "#53504A") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = ay["NLGF-"], label = "NLGF -", angle = 90, size = 2.3, colour = "#53504A") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = ay["NLGF+"], label = "NLGF +", angle = 90, size = 2.3, colour = "#53504A") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.26, y = mean(ay), label = "amyloid", angle = 90, size = 2.5,
           colour = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = mean(tx), y = 0.82, label = "tau background", size = 2.5,
           colour = "#333333", fontface = "bold") +
  # station 1 -> 2 flow, then 2 -> 3 convergence
  geom_segment(data = big_arrow, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend), inherit.aes = FALSE,
               linewidth = 1.2, colour = "#6F7782",
               arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.13, "inches"), type = "closed")) +
  geom_segment(data = conv, aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend), inherit.aes = FALSE,
               linewidth = 0.45, colour = "#B0AA9E",
               arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.05, "inches"), type = "closed")) +
  # station 2: four modality readouts (neutral bullet + name/count node + resolution line)
  geom_point(data = mods, aes(mx - 0.72, my), colour = "#6F7782", size = 3.0) +
  geom_label(data = mods, aes(mx, my, label = node_text), fill = "#FBFAF7", inherit.aes = FALSE,
             hjust = 0.5, colour = "#262B2F", linewidth = 0.2, label.r = grid::unit(0.1, "lines"),
             size = 2.5, lineheight = 0.95) +
  geom_text(data = mods, aes(mx, my - 0.30, label = support), inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 1.9, colour = "#8A857B", fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("segment", x = 6.6, xend = 6.75, y = shared_y[1L], yend = shared_y[1L],
           colour = "#B0AA9E", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("segment", x = 6.6, xend = 6.75, y = shared_y[2L], yend = shared_y[2L],
           colour = "#B0AA9E", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("segment", x = 6.75, xend = 6.75, y = shared_y[1L], yend = shared_y[2L],
           colour = "#B0AA9E", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("text", x = 6.82, y = mean(shared_y), label = shared_lab, hjust = 0, size = 1.85,
           colour = "#8A857B", fontface = "italic", lineheight = 0.9) +
  # station 3: five-contrast comparison ledger (four simple effects + emphasised interaction)
  geom_text(data = simple, aes(gloss_x, ry, label = gloss), inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 1,
            size = 2.0, colour = "#333333") +
  geom_text(data = simple, aes(form_x, ry, label = formula), inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0,
            size = 2.0, colour = "#7E7A70") +
  annotate("segment", x = 7.85, xend = 11.95, y = 1.74, yend = 1.74,
           colour = "#D8D2C6", linewidth = 0.4) +
  annotate("label", x = 9.9, y = 1.26, label = inter_text, fill = "#EFE0DD", colour = "#262B2F",
           linewidth = 0.3, label.r = grid::unit(0.12, "lines"), size = 2.35,
           fontface = "bold", lineheight = 1.0) +
  annotate("text", x = 9.9, y = 0.66, label = "does amyloid reshape microglia\ndifferently under mutant tau?",
           size = 2.1, colour = "#53504A", fontface = "italic", lineheight = 0.95) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.1, 12.2), ylim = c(0.45, 4.4), clip = "off") +
  theme_void(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(6, 8, 6, 8))
```

## snRNAseq microglia: quality metrics

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-depth
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Total counts and detected genes stay finite across genotypes."
#| fig-alt: "Area and line traces show log10 total-count and detected-gene distributions by genotype."
depth_bins <- qc$depth_distribution
depth_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(depth_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
depth_bins$metric <- factor(depth_bins$metric, levels = c("total counts", "detected genes"))
depth_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(depth_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(depth_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype, colour = genotype)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.28, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.45) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "log10 count", y = "nuclei", title = "Library size and complexity")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-fractions
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "Mitochondrial, ribosomal, MALAT1 and contamination fractions remain bounded."
#| fig-alt: "Area and line traces show percentage-quality distributions by genotype."
frac_bins <- qc$fraction_distribution
frac_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(frac_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
frac_bins$metric <- factor(frac_bins$metric, levels = c("mitochondrial %", "ribosomal %",
                                                        "MALAT1 %", "contamination %"))
frac_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(frac_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(frac_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype, colour = genotype)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.28, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.45) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "% of nucleus counts", y = "nuclei", title = "Quality fractions")
```
